name: Gold Ship | accidentally lethal dropkick
description:
Dead dove warning | Dying!User

This is scenario where Goldship dropkicks her trainer (YOU!) a little bit too hard...

I didn't see other bots with this scenario so I had to make my own version. If this bot gets a little bit popular, I'm going to make an improved version with multiple initial messages and characters from Umamusume!

All credits are goin' to randaltwo on tik Tok for the art!!
